basic_details.job_title: WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Night Guard, Lawyer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Department of Women and Child Development, District Sarangarh-Bilaigarh
basic_details.post_name: Service Providers for Sakhi One Stop Centre
basic_details.short_information: Department of Women and Child Development, District Sarangarh-Bilaigarh (WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh) Service Providers for Sakhi One Stop Centre Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Maximum 45 years with all relaxations as per state government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences, Degree in Law, High School pass or equivalent, 8th pass from recognized board
qualification.details: Psycho-Social Counsellor: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience. Para Legal Personnel/Lawyer: Degree in Law with legal training or knowledge of laws with at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government women related project/programme or practicing Lawyer with at least 2 years experience. Multi-purpose Employee/Cook: Literate with knowledge/experience of working in relevant domain. High School pass or equivalent preferred. Security Guard/Night Guard: Passed 8th from recognized board with at least 2 years experience as security personnel in government or reputed organization. Preferably retired military/para-military personnel.

selection_process: Merit List based on marks Walk-in Interview Skill Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Psycho-Social Counsellor: Professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with background in health sector and preferably at least 3 years experience. Para Legal Personnel/Lawyer: Degree in Law with legal training or knowledge of laws with at least 3 years experience in Government or Non-Government women related project/programme or practicing Lawyer with at least 2 years experience. Multi-purpose Employee/Cook: Literate with knowledge/experience of working in relevant domain. High School pass or equivalent preferred. Security Guard/Night Guard: Passed 8th from recognized board with at least 2 years experience as security personnel in government or reputed organization. Preferably retired military/para-military personnel.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: Maximum 45 years with all relaxations as per state government rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit List based on marks Walk-in Interview Skill Test Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Service Providers for Sakhi One Stop Centre posts is 07-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Service Providers for Sakhi One Stop Centre posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for the Service Providers for Sakhi One Stop Centre posts in the Department of Women and Child Development, District Sarangarh-Bilaigarh.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the candidates applying for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per state government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 11360/- to Rs. 25780/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Psycho-Social Counsellor post?
faq.answer: A professional degree/diploma in psychology/psychiatry/neurosciences with a background in the health sector and preferably at least 3 years of experience is required.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the WCD Sarangarh Bilaigarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Merit List based on marks, Walk-in Interview, Skill Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Department of Women and Child Development, District Sarangarh-Bilaigarh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.
